name: Lost Contestant Event
outcomes: A half-retired crawler trades you survival gossip for your least convincing nod.
Someone in a mascot head whispers a shortcut, then denies having a body.

name: Vending Shrine Event
outcomes: The vending machine demands tribute and dispenses something almost useful.
A holy light flickers behind expired chips.

name: Questionable Shop Event
outcomes: The shopkeeper accepts credits, teeth, and positive survey results.
A kiosk offers discounts that feel like threats.

name: Crowd Vote Event
outcomes: The audience votes to make this slightly worse.
The crowd poll glitches and rewards pity.

name: Service Elevator Confessional
outcomes: A terrified maintenance worker admits the elevator only respects bribes.
The elevator opens to reveal a janitor who has been between floors since Tuesday.

name: Audience Pity Drop
outcomes: The crowd dislikes you enough to help ironically.
A drone drops supplies with the accuracy of a drunk pelican.

name: Sponsor Focus Group
outcomes: A tablet asks whether you feel hunted in a premium way.
Your screams are categorized as valuable brand feedback.

name: Broken Map Kiosk
outcomes: The kiosk draws a route through several walls and one emotional boundary.
A map printer spits out directions written in fresh panic.

name: Employee Only Door
outcomes: Behind the door: mops, bones, and someone else's name tag.
The sign says Employees Only. The blood says Contractors Also.

name: Coupon Baptismal
outcomes: You are blessed with savings and lightly cursed with fine print.
A fountain of expired coupons whispers your middle name.

name: Maintenance Breakroom
outcomes: A half-eaten sandwich glows with practical wisdom.
The coffee pot has achieved sentience and hates supervisors.

name: Unionized Goblin Checkpoint
outcomes: The goblins demand safer stabbing conditions and offer directions.
A shop steward trades you gossip for not being management.

name: Liability Waiver Altar
outcomes: Signing the waiver makes the room briefly stop pretending to care.
The altar stamps APPROVED on your shadow.

name: Drone Repair Nest
outcomes: Camera drones molt broken lenses into a small useful pile.
A repair drone mistakes you for equipment and buffs out a bruise.

name: Ominous Merch Table
outcomes: A vendor sells shirts commemorating deaths that have not happened yet.
The merch table accepts credits and denial.

name: Premium Vending Tomb
outcomes: A vending machine offers three price tiers and one moral compromise.
The card reader accepts payment, teeth, and sincere apologies.

name: Medical Claims Window
outcomes: A clerk says your injury is pre-existing because you entered the dungeon.
A glass window slides open just enough to judge you.

name: Lost and Found Sarcophagus
outcomes: Inside: keys, wallets, and a weapon nobody wants to explain.
The lost-and-found bin gives back something you never owned.

name: Commentator Argument
outcomes: Two unseen hosts argue whether your survival counts as strategy.
The broadcast booth insults your posture, then drops a consolation prize.

name: Breakfast Buffet Ambush
outcomes: The eggs are powdered. The danger is fresh.
A waffle iron opens like a holy book of violence.

name: Quarter Slot Oracle
outcomes: A coin slot predicts your future in exact change.
The oracle demands quarters and dispenses a prophecy about stains.

name: Customer Service Window
outcomes: A representative apologizes for the inconvenience of your mortality.
You take a number. The number takes offense.

name: Security Tape Theater
outcomes: A monitor replays your worst dodge from six angles.
The tape shows you entering this room tomorrow.

name: Forbidden Break Area
outcomes: A plastic chair offers five minutes of peace and one suspicious snack.
The break timer starts at thirty seconds and counts down in screams.

name: Executive Pop-Up Shop
outcomes: A blazer on a mannequin sells premium survival solutions.
The shop smells like leather, fear, and subscription renewals.

name: Haunted Photo Booth
outcomes: The photo strip shows four poses and one autopsy.
A flash goes off. Something behind you smiles in the print.

name: Safety Training Loop
outcomes: A training video teaches you how not to die, then contradicts itself.
The narrator sounds disappointed but gives practical advice.

name: Expired First Aid Station
outcomes: A first-aid box contains bandages, dust, and legal disclaimers.
The antiseptic expired before you were born, but it has ambition.

name: Mascot Green Room
outcomes: Several costume heads stare from hooks like retired gods.
A handler whispers which mascots bite and which negotiate.

name: Algorithmic Confessional
outcomes: A screen says it understands your preferences. It recommends violence.
You confess nothing. The algorithm already knew.

name: Parking Validation Desk
outcomes: The attendant validates purchases, parking, and mild panic.
A tiny bell summons commerce from the concrete dark.

name: Floor Sponsor Shrine
outcomes: A logo pulses like a sacred wound.
You kneel before branding and receive something almost useful.
